race.comment: PRINCE PIER (7) faced the starter for the first time last start and was okay in finishing fifth at Sunshine Coast over 1200m, beaten 6 lengths. Plenty of scope for improvement and worth following up. KING COBAMA (3) settled well back last start and never threatened when 5 lengths from the winner in eighth over 1200m at Doomben. Won't find this as tough so he will prove hard to beat. OVEROPTOMYSTIC (6) is an Exceedance gelding who makes his debut. Placed in most recent trial and worth watching for any market moves. OVER THE LOUVRE (5) is a three-year-old gelding on debut by The Autumn Sun from La Velata who has been a prolific producer of winners. Coming along well at the trials with a win at his most recent at Gold Coast. Promising type who is worth considering if popular in betting.
